zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith Twynhoe於1438年出生在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同時，她的父親William Twinyho28歲，母親Ankaret Hawkeston33歲。她於1460年與Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith Twynhoe于1438年出生在英国多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同时，她的父亲William Twinyho28岁，母亲Ankaret Hawkeston33岁。她于1460年与Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron在英国多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年在英国英格兰多瑟特享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith Twynhoe was born in 1438, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England, her father, William Twinyho, was 28 and her mother, Ankaret Hawkeston, was 33. She married Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron in 1460, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1467, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith Twynhoe est née en 1438, à Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, William Twinyho, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ankaret Hawkeston, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron en 1460, à Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1467, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.Winterbourne, Dorset, England: Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edith Twynhoe 1438 in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Twinyho 28 und ihre Mutter Ankaret Hawkeston 33. Sie hat 1460 in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1467 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron nel 1460, nel Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1467, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edith Twynhoeが1438年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンで生まれた時，父William Twinyhoは28歳，母Ankaret Hawkestonは33歳であった。1460年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンでSir Thomas de la Lynd I Baronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edith Twynhoe(이)가 1438년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Twinyho(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ankaret Hawkeston(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron em 1460, em Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1467, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ro.Winterbourne, Dorset, England: Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith Twynhoe родилась в 1438 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Twinyho было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ankaret Hawkeston, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de la Lynd I Baron в 1460 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1467 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.
